SEARCH
Package de.dhbw.memory.model

Class Card

java.lang.Object
de.dhbw.memory.model.Card
public class Card extends Object
A single memory card with a unique id, a motif shared with its pair, and mutable state.
Author:
Markus Wenninger

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Card(int id, String motif)
    Creates a face-down, unmatched card.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    flip()
    Toggles the face-up state (face-down ↔ face-up).
    int
    getId()
    Returns the unique card id.
    String
    getMotif()
    Returns the motif name used to detect pairs.
    boolean
    isFaceUp()
    Returns true when the card is showing its face.
    boolean
    isMatched()
    Returns true when this card has been permanently matched.
    void
    match()
    Marks the card as permanently matched and keeps it face-up.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Card

      public Card(int id, String motif)
      Creates a face-down, unmatched card.
      Parameters:
      id - unique index on the board (0 … size²−1)
      motif - image name shared with exactly one other card; equality determines a match

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the unique card id.
      Returns:
      0-based index assigned at board creation

    • getMotif

      public String getMotif()
      Returns the motif name used to detect pairs.
      Returns:
      motif id shared with exactly one other card on the board

    • isFaceUp

      public boolean isFaceUp()
      Returns true when the card is showing its face.
      Returns:
      true if the card is currently face-up

    • isMatched

      public boolean isMatched()
      Returns true when this card has been permanently matched.
      Returns:
      true if the card has been matched and stays face-up

    • flip

      public void flip()
      Toggles the face-up state (face-down ↔ face-up).

    • match

      public void match()
      Marks the card as permanently matched and keeps it face-up. Idempotent.
